content.en:
"Tianhe Dao Mountain is completely destroyed!"

Ye Tian was in a very good mood.

Although there are still some branches of Tianhe Dao Mountain, as well as the realm gods and the Eternal Dao Realm that are exposed in the outside world, after they learn that Tianhe Dao Mountain has been destroyed, they will definitely not dare to rebuild Tianhe Dao Mountain, and they will definitely switch to other forces.

Therefore, Tianhe Dao Mountain is really ~ is gone.

If the gods of the Heavenly Providence Realm were still alive, and when they learned that Ye Tian did it, they would definitely regret finding the Hades Demon Hall to kill Ye Tian.

If they didn't do this, Ye Tian wouldn't have come to destroy Tianhe Dao Mountain.

......

Another period of time has passed.

On this day, a piece of good news came, the Ye family of the human race gave birth to an Eternal Realm God Realm Beginner Realm God.

And that's just the beginning.

In the following years, one after another Eternal Realm Divine Realm condensed the Eternal Realm Spirit, and cultivated to step into the Eternal Realm Divine Realm Elementary Cultivation.

"Father, the human race has already given birth to more than ten Eternal Realm God Realm Primary-Order Realm Gods!"

Ye Xingchen came to report.

"I see!"

Ye Tian nodded, and immediately informed the Realm Court Headquarters that the Terran wanted to apply to become a powerful force.

Unlike the previous time, you need to go to the Boundary Court Headquarters by yourself to apply for a medium power, but to apply to become a powerful force, the Boundary Court Headquarters sends the Boundary God over, and you don't need to go to the Boundary Court Headquarters.

Soon, the realm god of the realm court came.

The Baihe Realm God is still among them, but it is not him who is presiding, but a middle-level realm god of the Eternal Realm God Realm-Dongchen Realm God!

The Dongchen Realm God has condensed the four Eternal Realm Spirits, and although the strength is not strong, there is no problem in being responsible for the promotion of the human race to a powerful force this time.

After all, it's not to fight, it's just to test the strength of the human race.

Terran Holy Country.

After the Dongchen Realm Gods came, they counted the number of Terran Realm Gods and realms, and after all of them were registered, they had to test their true strength, if it was a false Realm God created by some kind of treasure, this kind of behavior of fooling the Realm Court was naturally not allowed.

After testing again and again, in the end, it was necessary to test the mid-level combat power of the Eternal Realm God Realm.

Ye Tian still didn't make a move, and let his son Ye Xingchen make a move, and he injured the Dongchen Realm God with one move, which was recognized.

That's it.

The Terrans have successfully risen to become one of the most powerful forces.

"Ye Tian Realm God congratulates you Terran, you have been successfully promoted to a powerful force, you have five places to enter the Eternal Realm and the Realm God Realm at will, and you can also send a Realm God to join the Realm Court. Of course, when a powerful realm god joins the company, he can only choose some ordinary positions. Dongchen Realm God said.

"What are the positions?"

Ye Tian asked.

Dongchen Jieshen introduced: "The ordinary positions in the Realm Court Headquarters are patrol officers, clerks, intelligence officers, gatekeepers, handymen and other positions, and they are clerks, specializing in handling the relocation of the Eternal Realm and related affairs. "

"I want an intelligence officer position!" Ye Tian said.

Dongchen Realm Divine Dao: "Ye Heaven Realm God, the position of intelligence officer is very popular, so if you want this position, you not only need the Eternal Realm God Realm Beginner Cultivation, but also give the Realm Court Headquarters 10,000 Eternal Boundary Stones. "

"10,000 Eternal Realm Stone !!"

Ye Tian frowned, this price is too high!

Ordinary powerful forces are reluctant to come up with so many Eternal Boundary Stones!

But soon, he figured it out.

The position of intelligence officer is not for the general powerful forces at all, but for those powerful forces with a certain background.

A really good position must require a certain price, otherwise you can only choose an ordinary position.

"Okay, I'm going to ask for a position as an intelligence officer!"

Ye Tian said.

Therefore, the 10,000 Eternal Realm Stone Flowers are worth it.

"Ye Tianjie Stone, please come with me to the Realm Court Headquarters, and by the way, take the junior Realm God who is going to take the position of intelligence officer, and I will handle the entry procedures for him. "Dongchen realm Shinto.

"Good!"

Ye Tian selected a first-level clansman from the Terran Ye family and took him to the Realm Realm Headquarters with him.

After a while, the Boundary Court headquarters arrived. []

Then, the Eastern Chen Realm God went through the formalities for Ye Tian and them, and Ye Tian also paid 10,000 Eternal Boundary Stones.

In this way, one of the Terran gods officially began to work as an intelligence officer at the Realm Headquarters.

And the Terrans have officially become a powerful force, with the treatment of a powerful force.

......

Time flies.

Gradually, Ye Tian knew the benefits and value of the position of an intelligence officer, just during this period of time, the value of the various information that the intelligence officer passed on to the human race was unimaginable.

It can be said that this 10,000 Eternal Realm Stone Flower is very worthwhile.

Through this information, Ye Tian had a better understanding of the overall situation in the Realm God Realm.

For example, the basic situation of the top forces in the entire Divine Kingdom, as well as the division of forces, and so on.

In the Eastern Wu Realm, the top forces seem to be very powerful, but they are nothing in the entire Realm God Realm.

Above the top forces are the supreme forces!

The Dongwu Realm is not ranked in the entire Realm God Realm, so there is no supreme force, but there is a supreme force in those powerful realms.

And the number of supreme forces in the entire Realm God Kingdom has reached three digits, which shows how terrifying the entire Realm God Kingdom is.

Other than that.

Ye Tian also knew that the war between the Realm God Kingdom and the Demon Seed Abyss had never ended, but was killing in a special area, but if he wanted to participate, he had to be at least a top force, and the powerful forces were not qualified to participate, not even to become cannon fodder.

At present, the intelligence agent of the Terran does not know where and where, mainly because of his lack of status, which makes it impossible to understand this information.

But after a long time, I became familiar with other world gods, and I might be able to understand.

"The human race is still a little transparent in the realm of the gods now!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He had also been asking the Terran informant to collect information on the Mysterious Devouring Demon Crystal substance, and he believed that this information should be collected soon.

Really.

Not long after, information about the substance of the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal was sent to Ye Tian, and this information was very complete.

"Many top forces are buying the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal, but the amount of acquisition is not large. Ye Tian muttered.

And according to this information, the most promising way for him to obtain a large number of Xuan Devouring Demon Crystals at the moment was to go to the Liuhu Boundary Rift in the Phoenix Realm.

This boundary crack is very large, and it contains a lot of Xuanwu Demon Crystal materials inside, and it is also one of the boundary seams that currently has the most materials such as Xuanwu Demon Crystal ore.
